lines.speaker: Jobless Jim
lines.text: 'ello again, guvna! Changed yer mind 'bout needin' a swab on deck? I can help out any way ye' fancy.

lines.speaker: Jobless Jim
lines.text: 'ello, guvna!

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Hello there. Who are you?

lines.speaker: Jobless Jim
lines.text: Jim's me name. Just 'avin a butcher's for anyone who wants some stuff done.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Oh, in the meat business are you?

lines.speaker: Jobless Jim
lines.text: Whatchu' on about? I'm after bees 'n honey.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Ah, so you're a farmer!

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Ah, I'm something of a farmer myself!

lines.speaker: Jobless Jim
lines.text: Use yer loaf! Why'd I be in the tub fer that. I'm brassic ain't I!

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Well, I have baked a loaf or two in my time as well.

lines.speaker: Jobless Jim
lines.text: You taking the mickey?

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: I'm just trying to work out what you do.

lines.speaker: Jobless Jim
lines.text: Well, then look at me boat and listen to wot's comin' out me gob!

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: I'm sorry, but I have no idea what you're trying to say to me. I'm just going to leave you to it.

lines.speaker: Jobless Jim
lines.text: Hmph! Suit yourself, guvna.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Ahh, a fellow sailor!

lines.speaker: Jobless Jim
lines.text: There we go! Hmm... But tell you what, guvna... If yer in the salt yourself, maybe ye'd be wantin' a bit o' a hand on deck?

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Thanks for the offer, but I'm still pretty new to it all. I don't think I'm ready to be hiring a crew yet, but I'll let you know when I am.

lines.speaker: Jobless Jim
lines.text: Hmph! Suit yourself, guvna.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Sounds good to me. Why don't you join my crew?

lines.speaker: Jobless Jim
lines.text: Aye aye, guvna. Bound to make some sovs wiv you, ain't I?

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Thanks for the offer, but I'm good at the moment.

lines.speaker: Jobless Jim
lines.text: Hmph! Suit yourself, guvna.

lines.speaker: Jobless Jim
lines.text: 'ello, Cap'n! 'tis a fine nanny goat ya 'av.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: I find it odd that I have an easier time understanding ghosts than you, Jim.

lines.speaker: Jobless Jim
lines.text: There ain't an amulet that can contain me rabbit, Cap'n.

sections.title: At port as a crew member

lines.speaker: Jobless Jim
lines.text: 'Ello, Cap'n! Anyfin' I can help yer with?

lines.speaker: Jobless Jim
lines.text: Yer hold's already empty, Cap'n.

lines.speaker: Jobless Jim
lines.text: Time to earn me shorts...

lines.speaker: Jobless Jim
lines.text: Yep, yer cargo hold's barren now. All's in yer' bank.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: How are you getting on?

lines.speaker: Jobless Jim
lines.text: Could do with more dough, but can't complain 'bout conditions.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: I'd best be off.

lines.speaker: Jobless Jim
lines.text: C for miles. C for fish.

lines.speaker: Jobless Jim
lines.text: I'm a bit taters in this wind.

lines.speaker: Jobless Jim
lines.text: Wish I had a boat.

lines.speaker: Jobless Jim
lines.text: Been on me pins all day i 'ave.

lines.speaker: Jobless Jim
lines.text: (Transcript missing. edit)

lines.speaker: Jobless Jim
lines.text: Me mince pies are on the sails.

lines.speaker: Jobless Jim
lines.text: There's somethin' in the drink to the [compass direction]!

lines.speaker: Jobless Jim
lines.text: Trimmed those sails good and proper, Captain!

lines.speaker: Jobless Jim
lines.text: (Transcript missing. edit)

lines.speaker: Jobless Jim
lines.text: (Transcript missing. edit)

lines.speaker: Jobless Jim
lines.text: 'avin a butchers at the hook.

lines.speaker: Jobless Jim
lines.text: Managed to hook some salvage! I'll put it in the cargo hold.

lines.speaker: Jobless Jim
lines.text: The cargo hold is full. I can't salvage anything.

lines.speaker: Jobless Jim
lines.text: I've caught a wind mote!

lines.speaker: Jobless Jim
lines.text: Enabling the wind catcher!

lines.speaker: Jobless Jim
lines.text: Disabling the wind catcher!

lines.speaker: Jobless Jim
lines.text: Aye, that's better.

lines.speaker: Jobless Jim
lines.text: I can't find any repair kits in the cargo hold.

lines.speaker: Jobless Jim
lines.text: 'ello, guvna!

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Hello there. Who are you?

lines.speaker: Jobless Jim
lines.text: Jim's me name. Just 'avin a butcher's for anyone who wants some stuff done.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Oh, in the meat business are you?

lines.speaker: Jobless Jim
lines.text: Whatchu' on about? I'm after bees 'n honey.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Ah, I'm something of a farmer myself!

lines.speaker: Jobless Jim
lines.text: Use yer loaf! Why'd I be in the tub fer that. I'm brassic ain't I!

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Well, I have baked a loaf or two in my time as well.

lines.speaker: Jobless Jim
lines.text: You taking the mickey?

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: I'm just trying to work out what you do.

lines.speaker: Jobless Jim
lines.text: Well, then look at me boat and listen to wot's comin' out me gob!

lines.speaker: Player

lines.speaker: Jobless Jim
